en: And believe me, if anybody can fix it, it's this guy. He's great. I appreciate that.
ko: 믿어줘, 고칠 수 있는 사람이 있다면 이 친구야. 정말 대단해.
ja: 信じてくれ、誰かが直せるならこの人だ。すごいやつだ。
zhTW: 相信我，如果有人能修好，就是這個人。他很厲害。
vi: Tin toi di, neu ai co the sua duoc thi la anh nay. Anh ay gioi lam.

en: Where are my manners? You want something to drink? That would be great.
I'm really craving ginger ale. Oh, we have ginger ale, right, Jeff? Do you?
ja: ジンジャーエールあるよね、ジェフ?
vi: Chung ta co ginger ale, dung khong, Jeff?

en: I cannot stock up enough ginger ale. I love ginger ale.
ko: 진저 에일을 충분히 사둘 수가 없어.
ja: いくらあっても足りない。
zhTW: 薑汁汽水怎麼囤都不夠。
vi: Toi khong the du tru du ginger ale.

en: Hey, how about I'll get in on the ginger ale. You sure you got enough?
ko: 그럼 내가 진저 에일 좀 가져올게. 충분히 있겠지?
ja: 俺もジンジャーエールもらおうかな。足りる?
zhTW: 嘿，我也來杯薑汁汽水。你確定夠嗎？
vi: Nay, toi cung muon ginger ale. Ban chac co du khong?

en: Oh, no, we got tons of ginger ale. Thank you, Jeff. Thank you.
ko: 아, 아니, 진저 에일이 엄청 많아.
ja: もちろん、たくさんある。
zhTW: 不，我們有很多薑汁汽水。
vi: Khong, chung toi co nhieu ginger ale lam.

en: So do you know the sex of the child? We're going to have a little baby boy.
ja: 子供の性別は分かってる?
zhTW: 所以，你知道孩子的性別嗎？
vi: Vay, ban biet gioi tinh cua dua be chua?

en: A little baby boy. How about that?
Have you thought about the skin color at all?
ko: 피부색에 대해 생각해본 적 있어? 뭐라고?
ja: 肌の色について考えたことある?えっ?
vi: Ban co nghi ve mau da khong? Xin loi?

en: I'm sorry? You know, the tone. Would you prefer it's a little darker, I would imagine?
ko: 톤 말이야, 좀 더 어두운 게 좋겠어?
ja: 色合いのこと、少し濃い方がいい?
zhTW: 你知道，色調，你希望深一點嗎？
vi: Ban biet do, tong mau, ban muon tham hon khong?

en: You might prefer it to be a little darker as opposed to lighter, no?
ko: 밝은 것보다 어두운 게 좋지, 그렇지?
ja: 少し濃い方がいいんじゃないかと思って
zhTW: 我猜你可能希望它深一點
vi: Toi tuong ban co the thich tham hon

en: Well, I mean, I've never even thought about it. But I guess, like, darker, I guess.
ko: 음, 그런 건 생각해본 적이 없어,
ja: えっと、考えたこともなかったけど、
zhTW: 嗯，我的意思是，我從來沒想過，
vi: A, y toi la, toi chua bao gio nghi ve dieu do,

en: Yeah, I would think. What? Right? Yeah, that makes sense.
zhTW: 是的，我也這麼想。什麼？對吧？
vi: Uh, toi cung nghi vay. Gi? Dung khong?

en: I... What? You prefer him to be darker? I prefer it.
ko: 너는 그가 더 어두운 게 좋다고? 나는 그렇게 생각해.
ja: 濃い方がいい?俺は濃い方がいい。
zhTW: 你希望他深一點？我希望。
vi: Ban muon be tham hon? Toi thich vay.

en: I mean, if someone's asking me if I had to choose, I'd say, let's go for it. Why are you choosing?
ja: 選ぶならって聞かれたら、彼女に聞いてみよう。
zhTW: 如果有人問我必須選，讓我們問問她。
vi: Neu ai do hoi toi phai chon, hay hoi co ay.

en: You probably like it a little lighter, maybe, no? No, I don't.
ko: 아마도 너는 좀 더 밝은 게 좋을 거야, 아닐까?
ja: 少し薄い方が好きかもでしょ?
zhTW: 你可能喜歡淺一點的，也許，不？
vi: Ban co le thich sang hon mot chut, co le, khong?

en: I don't think I want my baby to be lighter.
ko: 아니, 내 아기가 더 밝은 건 원하지 않아.
ja: いいえ、赤ちゃんを薄くしたいとは思わない。
zhTW: 不，我不覺得我想要我的寶寶淺一點。
vi: Khong, toi khong nghi toi muon be cua toi sang hon.

en: I haven't thought about that at all. I'm surprised that you've thought about it.
ko: 그런 건 전혀 생각해본 적 없어.
ja: あなたがそれを考えたことに驚いた。
vi: Toi ngac nhien la ban da nghi ve dieu do.
